understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to complete each level by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time; once all goals are covered within the step limit, the level reports WIN and progressing through all levels wins the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn consisted of a CLICK on a target grid coordinate, which directed the currently selected piece to attempt to move to that location (typically along allowed paths/lines). If the destination or path was blocked by walls/obstacles or otherwise invalid, the piece would not move and the step would still be consumed. Selecting/clicking could also change which piece is controlled (when clicking on/near another selectable piece), and movement was constrained by level geometry; pushes (if present) would occur only when a move attempts to enter an occupied tile and the rules permit shifting the blocking object, otherwise the move is blocked.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 1/2 failed after 16 turns. Restarting the same level.

Since direct movement is impossible, try clicking the goal area to attempt a teleport/placement mechanic onto the + tiles. Click the center of the goal region (cell x=12,y=6) -> pixel [36,18].
